full_text:
Hello Anastasiya,

Thank you for the good meeting yesterday!

Please find below offer prices for both Eppendorf and Sigma 24x 1,5ml/2ml, RT, centrifuges.

Warranty Eppendorf 2 years, Sigma 1 year. Prices alv 0%, includes all delivery and freight charges to Biomedicum. Prices valid till 30.8.2019.

Eppendorf:

• rotor 24 x 2,0ml

• max speed 21,330 x g

• model below is with keypad, also available with rotary knobs with same price

5425 with rotor FA-24x2, with foil keypad #4661162 (EP5405000115) 2.248,00€

Estimated delivery time 2-3 weeks

Sigma:

• rotor 24 x 2,0ml

• max speed 16,000 x g

10014 Mikrosentrifugi 1-14 1.200,00€

12094 polypropen rotor without lid 250,00€

total 1.450,00€

https://www.sigma-zentrifugen.de/fileadmin/user_upload/sigma/produkte/pdf/broschueren/EN/Sigma_1-14_1-14K_E.pdf

Estimated delivery time 4 weeks

How does that sound? Please let me know if you would like to place an order for either one.

Best regards

Pia

Pia Lindström, Labnet OY

Mäkituvantie 7, FIN-01510 Vantaa

tel. +358 20 741 3183

mob. +358 40 509 8744

pia.lindstrom@labnet.fi

| Thu, 15 Aug, 14:16 (6 days ago)
